name: Farm Sanctuary - Watkins Glen
description: Founded in 1986, Farm Sanctuary is the original farm animal sanctuary in the US. Home to nearly 1,000 rescued animals on their New York shelter, they advocate for policy changes and educate the public about the treatment of farm animals.

name: Farm Sanctuary - Acton
description: Farm Sanctuary's Southern California shelter in Acton provides refuge for hundreds of rescued farm animals. The shelter offers guided tours and educational programs about compassionate living.

name: Farm Sanctuary - Orland
description: Farm Sanctuary's Northern California shelter in Orland provides a safe haven for rescued farm animals including cows, pigs, chickens, goats, and sheep.

name: Woodstock Farm Sanctuary
description: A nonprofit animal rescue located on 135 acres in High Falls, NY, in the Hudson Valley. Woodstock Farm Sanctuary rescues animals from cases of abuse, neglect, and abandonment and provides them with a loving home for life.

name: Catskill Animal Sanctuary
description: One of the largest farm animal sanctuaries in the eastern US, Catskill Animal Sanctuary provides a loving home for hundreds of rescued horses, pigs, cows, chickens, ducks, goats, and sheep.

name: Animal Place
description: Founded in 1989, Animal Place is one of the oldest and largest sanctuaries for farmed animals in the United States. The main facility occupies 600 acres and provides refuge to roughly 300 rescued farmed animals.

name: The Gentle Barn - California
description: The Gentle Barn rescues and rehabilitates animals from severe abuse, and uses their stories to teach empathy and compassion to at-risk youth. Founded in 1999, they offer therapy sessions and educational experiences with animals.

name: The Gentle Barn - Tennessee
description: The Gentle Barn's Tennessee location rescues animals from abuse and neglect, offering therapy programs and educational tours that connect visitors with rescued farm animals.

name: VINE Sanctuary
description: VINE Sanctuary is an LGBTQ-led farmed animal refuge in Vermont that works for social and environmental justice as well as animal liberation. They provide lifetime care for rescued farm animals.

name: Poplar Spring Animal Sanctuary
description: A nonprofit animal sanctuary in Maryland providing a permanent home for over 200 rescued farm animals, including horses, cows, pigs, goats, sheep, chickens, turkeys, ducks, and geese.

name: Ironwood Pig Sanctuary
description: One of the largest pig sanctuaries in the US, providing lifetime care for over 600 rescued pigs on their 82-acre Arizona property. They rescue pot-bellied pigs that have been abandoned, neglected, or abused.
address: 34656 E Crystal Visions Rd, Marana, AZ 85658

name: Heartwood Haven
description: An accredited vegan farm animal sanctuary in Roy, Washington. Heartwood Haven provides shelter, care, and enriching environments for rescued farm and domestic animals.

name: Luvin Arms Animal Sanctuary
description: A 501(c)(3) nonprofit animal sanctuary for abused or neglected farmed animals in Erie, Colorado. Luvin Arms provides a loving forever home for rescued animals and promotes nonviolence towards all living beings.

name: Peaceful Prairie Sanctuary
description: A vegan sanctuary in Deer Trail, Colorado, dedicated to rescuing and providing lifelong care for farmed animals. They advocate for a vegan lifestyle as the only ethical response to animal exploitation.
address: 81503 E County Rd 22, Deer Trail, CO 80105

name: Indraloka Animal Sanctuary
description: Founded in 2005, Indraloka rescues and provides lifetime care for farm animals facing abuse, neglect, hoarding, and worse. Located on nearly 100 acres in Dalton, Pennsylvania.

name: Tamerlaine Sanctuary & Preserve
description: A farmed animal sanctuary and nature preserve in Montague, New Jersey, providing rescue and lifelong care for abused and neglected farm animals while promoting compassionate living.

name: Rancho Compasion
description: A non-profit farmed animal sanctuary in Nicasio, California, providing lifelong care and sanctuary for rescued farm animals. They offer tours and educational programs.

name: Charlie's Acres Farm Animal Sanctuary
description: A 501(c)(3) non-profit farmed animal sanctuary in Sonoma, California, rescuing and rehabilitating farm animals and educating the public about compassionate choices.

name: Iowa Farm Sanctuary
description: A nonprofit organization dedicated to rescuing abused, neglected, and abandoned farm animals in the state of Iowa, providing them a forever home and advocating for their rights.

name: SoulSpace Farm Sanctuary
description: A nonprofit farm animal sanctuary in New Richmond, Wisconsin, providing a safe and loving forever home for rescued farm animals while educating the community about compassionate living.
address: 1976 County Road CC, New Richmond, WI 54017

name: Enchanted Farm Sanctuary
description: A nonprofit farmed animal sanctuary in Newberg, Oregon, providing permanent homes for abused, abandoned, and neglected farm animals.

name: Wildwood Farm Sanctuary
description: A 98-acre farmed animal sanctuary in Newberg, Oregon, providing rescue and lifelong care for farm animals while educating the public about animal agriculture.

name: Rowdy Girl Sanctuary
description: A former cattle ranch in Texas converted into a vegan farm animal sanctuary. Founded by Renee King-Sonnen who transformed her husband's cattle ranching operation into a sanctuary for the animals.

name: Piece of Peace Animal Sanctuary
description: A farm animal sanctuary in Marysville, California, dedicated to rescuing and providing permanent homes for abused and neglected farm animals.

name: Loving Farm Animal Sanctuary
description: A farm animal sanctuary in Santa Rosa, California, rescuing and providing lifetime care for farm animals while promoting compassion and veganism.

name: Dreamtime Sanctuary
description: A farm animal sanctuary in Elgin, Texas, providing a safe haven for rescued farmed animals and promoting compassionate living.

name: Happily Ever Esther Farm Sanctuary
description: Founded in 2014 by the family behind Esther the Wonder Pig, this 50-acre farm sanctuary in Campbellville, Ontario rescues abused, neglected and abandoned farmed animals. Named after the famous social media pig who inspired millions.

name: Cedar Row Farm Sanctuary
description: A farm animal sanctuary in Lakeside, Ontario, providing lifelong sanctuary for rescued farm animals including cows, pigs, sheep, goats, chickens, and ducks.

name: Farmhouse Garden Animal Home
description: Run by former farmers and cattle ranchers who had a change of heart, this sanctuary and organic vegetable farm in Uxbridge, Ontario provides a loving home for rescued farm animals.

name: Wishing Well Sanctuary
description: A federally registered charitable organization in Ontario, Canada, giving farm animals a second chance at life by providing them with a compassionate, nurturing forever home.

name: Edgar's Mission Farm Sanctuary
description: Located in Lancefield, Victoria, Edgar's Mission is a nonprofit farmed animal sanctuary home to more than 500 formerly farmed animals. They seek to create a humane and just world for all through education and advocacy.

name: Where Pigs Fly Farm Sanctuary
description: One of Australia's leading farm animal sanctuaries, founded in 2014. Located in the Wollombi Valley, they provide sanctuary to over 200 farmed animals rescued from various tragic circumstances.

name: Lefty's Place Farm Sanctuary
description: A vegan farm animal sanctuary in the Macedon Ranges, Victoria, approximately 70km north of Melbourne. The property serves as both a residence and sanctuary for rescued farm animals.

name: The Black Sheep Animal Sanctuary
description: Established in 2009, this vegan sanctuary in Otaki Forks, New Zealand rescues and rehabilitates abused animals including ex-dairy cows, ex-factory farm pigs, and ex-battery chickens.

name: The Animal Sanctuary NZ
description: A farm animal sanctuary based in Matakana, New Zealand, providing rescue and lifelong care for abused, neglected, and abandoned farm animals.

name: Franklin Farm Sanctuary
description: A farm animal sanctuary in New Zealand dedicated to rescuing and providing permanent homes for farmed animals while educating the public about compassionate living.

name: Surge Sanctuary
description: A UK registered charity founded by Earthling Ed, providing a safe haven for over 100 rescued animals on 18 acres in the Nottinghamshire countryside. Home to pigs, cows, chickens, turkeys, goats, and more.

name: Goodheart Animal Sanctuaries
description: Home to more than 300 rescued animals on a 92-acre site in Worcestershire, UK. Goodheart has a dedicated education programme to raise awareness of farmed animals' suffering.

name: Dean Farm Trust
description: A 62-acre animal sanctuary just outside Chepstow in South Wales with 200 rescued animals. Their mission is to rescue, rehabilitate and give a home for life to abused, neglected and unwanted animals whilst promoting compassionate living.

name: Tower Hill Stables Animal Sanctuary
description: Founded in 1993 at Bradwell-on-Sea in Essex, Tower Hill Stables provides a safe haven for over 450 animals including pigs, cows, swans, horses and more.

name: Fundacion Santuario Gaia
description: Founded in 2012, Santuario Gaia is a vegan rescue and recovery center for farmed animals in the Catalan Pyrenees. Home to 1,500 animals including sheep, goats, cows, horses, pigs, chickens, ducks, turkeys, dogs and cats.

name: Mino Valley Farm Sanctuary
description: A safe haven for 300+ abused and abandoned farm animals in the Ribeira Sacra, Galicia, Spain. Set on 50 acres of forests and wild meadows in the magical valleys near Ferreira De Panton.

name: Fundacion El Hogar Animal Sanctuary
description: The first animal sanctuary in Spain, founded in 2007. Originally started as a small-scale dog and cat rescue in Madrid, it has grown into a full farmed animal sanctuary promoting veganism.

name: El Refugio del Burrito
description: A donkey sanctuary in Fuente de Piedra, Malaga, providing permanent care for rescued donkeys and mules in southern Spain.

name: Hof Butenland
description: A renowned vegan farm animal sanctuary in Butjadingen, Germany. The operators live vegan and give animals their life and freedom, breaking down categories of dairy cow, veal calf, or experimental cow.

name: Erdlingshof
description: A vegan animal sanctuary in Kollnburg, Bavaria, Germany, providing lifelong care for rescued farm animals in the Bavarian Forest.

name: Gut Aiderbichl
description: Europe's largest animal sanctuary with locations across multiple countries. The main sanctuary in Henndorf am Wallersee, Austria, provides a safe haven for rescued farm and domestic animals.

name: Gnadenhof Melief
description: A farm animal sanctuary in Sogel, Lower Saxony, Germany, providing lifelong care and protection for rescued farm animals.

name: Tuulispaa Animal Sanctuary
description: A vegan animal sanctuary in Somero, Finland, providing lifelong care for rescued farm animals and promoting compassionate living in the Nordic region.

name: Tigerharen Sanctuary
description: A vegan animal sanctuary in Sweden, operating since 2004. They purchased their own farm in 2017 and continue to provide rescue and care for farmed animals.

name: Akka's Ganzenparadijs
description: A goose sanctuary in Dalen, Netherlands, providing a safe haven for rescued geese and other waterfowl.

name: Stichting De Leemweg
description: A vegan farm animal sanctuary in Zandhuizen, Netherlands, providing lifelong care for rescued farm animals.

name: Juliana's Animal Sanctuary
description: The first farm animal sanctuary in Colombia and the first in South America verified by the Global Federation of Animal Sanctuaries. Located in the Andes near Chia, Cundinamarca, they have rescued over 3,000 animals.

name: Santuario Igualdad Interespecie
description: An animal sanctuary in El Monte, Chile, about 50km from Santiago. Founded in 2014, they rescue, shelter and protect animals surviving the meat, dairy and egg industry.

name: Santuario Amor Que Salva
description: A vegan animal sanctuary in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil, founded in 2020. The founders made the transition to veganism as a family in 2017 and began rescuing farm animals from slaughter.

name: Freedom Farm Sanctuary
description: A non-profit animal sanctuary in Israel, co-founded in 2016 in Moshav Olesh, 45 minutes north of Tel Aviv. Home to more than 250 rescued animals, offering tours for children and adults.

name: Sadhana Forest Animal Sanctuary - India
description: One of the only vegan farm animal sanctuaries in Asia, founded in 2016 near Auroville, India. Provides a loving home for rescued cows, dogs, and cats.

name: Animal Rahat
description: An organization in Sangli, Maharashtra, India, dedicated to relieving the suffering of working animals used in agriculture, transport, and entertainment. They operate rescue and rehabilitation programs.

name: Sadhana Forest Animal Sanctuary - Kenya
description: A vegan animal sanctuary in Kenya providing a loving home for rescued cows and other animals destined for slaughter or suffering from serious injury.

name: Greyton Farm Animal Sanctuary
description: Established in 2014 on 40 hectares just 7km outside Greyton in the Western Cape, South Africa. A registered nonprofit providing lifelong care for rescued farmed animals.

name: Farm Sanctuary SA
description: A boutique sanctuary for rescued farmed animals in the Franschhoek Valley, South Africa. Also offers wine-tastings, barn accommodation, and a plant-based cafe. Home to the famous painting pig Pigcasso.

name: Asher's Farm Sanctuary
description: A vegan farm animal sanctuary in Pretoria East, South Africa, providing a place where animals can heal, thrive, and live their lives free from harm.

name: Ricky's Drift
description: Set at the foot of the Rooiberg Mountains in the Klein Karoo, South Africa. A vegan farming community, working olive farm, and animal sanctuary.

name: Wild Vegan Farm Animal Sanctuary
description: Located in a rural valley in South Africa's Gauteng province, caring for 174 rescued farm animals including alpacas, donkeys, pot-bellied pigs, chickens, rabbits, ducks and dogs.

name: AnimO Animal Sanctuary
description: A farm animal sanctuary in Chiba, Japan, home to more than 60 rescued animals. One of the pioneering animal sanctuaries in Japan.

name: Honey's Farm Sanctuary
description: A farm sanctuary in Okayama, Japan, started in 2008. One of the earliest farm animal sanctuaries in Japan, providing lifelong care for rescued farm animals.

name: Canterbury Tails Animal Rescue
description: A farm animal rescue and sanctuary based near Oxford, Waimakariri, North Canterbury, New Zealand. Dedicated to rescuing farmed animals and promoting plant-based living.

name: Arborfield Sanctuary
description: Located north of Auckland, New Zealand, Arborfield Sanctuary rescues farm animals that have been abandoned, neglected or abused, providing them with a permanent loving home.

name: Blackberry Creek Farm Animal Sanctuary
description: A farm animal sanctuary in Colfax, California, providing rescue and lifelong care for abused and neglected farm animals in the Sierra foothills.

name: Meadowbrook Animal Sanctuary
description: An animal sanctuary in Perris, California, providing a haven for rescued farm animals and promoting compassion through educational programs.
